ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/jetpack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/jetpack
Language: php
Security, performance, marketing, and design tools — Jetpack is made by WordPress experts to make WP sites safer and faster, and help you grow your traffic.

EasyAdmin is a fast, beautiful and modern admin generator for Symfony applications.

URL: https://github.com/PrestaShop/PrestaShop
Language: php
PrestaShop is the universal open-source software platform to build your e-commerce solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/WordPress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/WordPress
Language: php
WordPress, Git-ified. This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please do not send pull requests. Submit pull requests to https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop and patches to https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ instead.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elementor/elementor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elementor/elementor
Language: php
The most advanced frontend drag & drop page builder. Create high-end, pixel perfect websites at record speeds. Any theme, any page, any design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opensourcepos/opensourcepos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opensourcepos/opensourcepos
Language: php
Open Source Point of Sale is a web based point of sale application written in PHP using CodeIgniter framework. It uses MySQL as the data back end and has a Bootstrap 3 based user interface.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: phpstan/phpstan
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan
Language: php
PHP Static Analysis Tool - discover bugs in your code without running it!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shopware/shopware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: php
Shopware 6 is an open commerce platform based on Symfony Framework and Vue and supported by a worldwide community and more than 3.100 community extensions
